question.text:
오늘 github CI/CD 강의를 들으며 클라우드에서 streamlit을 실행하는 실습에서
```Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/home/dlsefira/Boostcamp-AI-Tech-Product-Serving/part2/04-cicd/venv/bin/streamlit", line 5, in <module>
    from streamlit.cli import main
  File "/home/dlsefira/Boostcamp-AI-Tech-Product-Serving/part2/04-cicd/venv/lib/python3.8/site-packages/streamlit/__init__.py", line 48, in <module>
    from streamlit.proto.RootContainer_pb2 import RootContainer
  File "/home/dlsefira/Boostcamp-AI-Tech-Product-Serving/part2/04-cicd/venv/lib/python3.8/site-packages/streamlit/proto/RootContainer_pb2.py", line 33, in <module>
    _descriptor.EnumValueDescriptor(
  File "/home/dlsefira/Boostcamp-AI-Tech-Product-Serving/part2/04-cicd/venv/lib/python3.8/site-packages/google/protobuf/descriptor.py", line 755, in __new__
    _message.Message._CheckCalledFromGeneratedFile()
TypeError: Descriptors cannot not be created directly.
If this call came from a _pb2.py file, your generated code is out of date and must be regenerated with protoc >= 3.19.0.
If you cannot immediately regenerate your protos, some other possible workarounds are:
 1. Downgrade the protobuf package to 3.20.x or lower.
 2. Set PROTOCOL_BUFFERS_PYTHON_IMPLEMENTATION=python (but this will use pure-Python parsing and will be much slower).```
이러한 오류가 발생하여 검색해보니

```pip install protobuf==3.20.1 ```
protobuf의 버전을 맞춰줘야 제대로 실행 됩니다. 실습에 있어 참고하시면 좋을 것 같습니다!

참고 : <https://discuss.streamlit.io/t/issue-with-protocol-buffers/25786>

answers.text:
저도 같은 현상으로 고생했습니다…
transformer 패키지도 같이 사용했는데 3.5.1버전에서 오류가 나서 4.9.0 버전으로 변경해서 사용했네요..

넘 잘하셨습니다..!

여기서 더 나아가서, “protobuf”가 무엇인지 검색해서 습득해보시면 더더 좋을 것 같아요 :slightly_smiling_face:
